_warning: REVIEW BEFORE COMMITTING. shell-cassette redacts bundled credential patterns + curated env-key values + your custom rules. It does NOT redact: AWS Secret Access Keys, JWTs (without opt-in), encoded credentials, binary output, cwd, stdin (until v0.5 ships option parity). Run `shell-cassette scan <path>` to verify before committing. See https://github.com/slgoodrich/shell-cassette/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md
